leadText: Victory Star (Japanese: しょうりのほし Victory Star) is an Ability introduced in Generation V. It is the signature Ability of Victini.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Victory Star increases the accuracy of moves (that are not one-hit knockout moves ) used by the Pokémon with this Ability and its allies in battle by approximately 10% (or precisely, a factor of 4506/4096) of their original accuracy. Victory Star can stack and does so multiplicatively (which means if there are two ally Pokémon with this Ability, the accuracy increase is 21%). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Victory Star has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Victory Star increases the accuracy of moves (that are not one-hit knockout moves ) used by the Pokémon with this Ability and its allies in battle by approximately 10% (or precisely, a factor of 4506/4096) of their original accuracy. Victory Star can stack and does so multiplicatively (which means if there are two ally Pokémon with this Ability, the accuracy increase is 21%).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Raises the accuracy of moves used by the Pokémon and allies standing next to it. * The accuracy of moves goes up! It also affects allies who are next to the Pokémon. * S MD The accuracy of moves goes up! It also has effects on teammates who are next to the Pokémon.
